title: Art direction consultation and asset replacement contract
summary: Turn the owner-provided art direction and art-thread consultation into semantic UI tokens, component hierarchy, asset slots and future cut-in replacement rules.
acceptance: Records module sourcing: B layout, C visual mood, A plus C map lamp/path language, B resident list, C plus A inspector and B plus C command bar
Defines semantic design tokens and component slots that can be implemented with CSS/Pixi placeholders now
Defines asset manifest fields for future final art replacement without hardcoding final images into product logic
Separates art advisory decisions from code architecture and keeps all external licensing commitments owner-gated
Records high-cost art work that must not be done in this remediation pass
forbiddenPaths: public release or platform verdict changes
